title: Malkazar's Fantasy Villager Pack
description: A villager resource pack focused on fantasy
body:
I want to showcase a custom fantasy villager pack I created! This resource pack changes the vanilla villager with custom fantasy races which I want to use in my survival world to create a rich fantasy world. The villagers are biome dependant, where different races spawn in different biomes. The biomes and race combination are as followed:

 

Vanilla villagers: savanna, desert

Humans: Plains

Dwarves: Taigas and snowy biomes

Wood elfs: forests and jungles

Dark elfs: Dark forest and swamps

High Elves: Cherry Groves and Birch Forests

https://youtu.be/7RlIxU2aN2I

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=hDUsayTa4Io

 

This resource pack requires optifine or ETF & EMF

 

This project used MyPowerBob's resource pack as a base, check it out!

https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/mypowerbobs-fantasy-villagers

 

You are free to use this in a project (non paid) or modify it, just link back to this page and remember to give credit. 

 

Features planned:

Modded profession skins: RPG series, other mods

Custom golems that fit with the races

Zombie villagers

More villager skins
